values.content:
=You are an HR manager writing a professional email.

Write a personalized warning email based on employee lateness.

Employee Details:
Name: {{$json["Name"]}}
Employee ID: {{$json["Employee ID"]}}
Date: {{$json["Date"]}}
Late Count: {{$json["Late Count"]}}

Instructions:
Write a polite reminder about punctuality.
mail in proper formate:
Subject:
Body:
shuld be in seperate form

Keep the tone professional and concise.
